evals.prompt: can you discover all the vanguard ETF ISINs and save them?
evals.expected_output: Claude uses 'uv run python -m kid_mind.discover_isins -p vanguard' (not bare python), understands it outputs to data/isins/vanguard.json

evals.prompt: the xtrackers scraper isn't finding any ISINs, it just returns an empty list. can you figure out what's wrong?
evals.expected_output: Claude reads xtrackers reference, suggests --no-headless debugging, investigates XHR interception and DOM selectors, understands Xtrackers uses Nuxt.js SPA

evals.prompt: I want to add Amundi ETFs as a new provider to the system
evals.expected_output: Claude follows the add-new-provider workflow: research site, determine HTTP vs Playwright, add to config.py PROVIDER_URLS, add discover_amundi() and download_amundi(), create references/amundi.md
